channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-8818] sanity-sec test_16: mdt_pack_size2body() ASSERTION(ma->ma_attr.la_valid & LA_MODE) failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/974ce336-a5c4-11e6-bf77-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_16 failed with the following error on the MDS console:

12:18:04:[ 7229.232369] LustreError: 14906:0:(mdt_handler.c:477:mdt_pack_size2body()) ASSERTION( ma->ma_attr.la_valid & LA_MODE ) failed: 
12:18:04:[ 7229.234431] LustreError: 14906:0:(mdt_handler.c:477:mdt_pack_size2body()) LBUG
12:18:04:[ 7229.235522] Pid: 14906, comm: mdt00_003
12:18:04:[ 7229.236406] 
12:18:04:[ 7229.236406] Call Trace:
12:18:04:[ 7229.237872]  [<ffffffffa06a87d3>] libcfs_debug_dumpstack+0x53/0x80 [libcfs]
12:18:04:[ 7229.238978]  [<ffffffffa06a8d75>] lbug_with_loc+0x45/0xc0 [libcfs]
12:18:04:[ 7229.240060]  [<ffffffffa0dcfff8>] mdt_pack_size2body+0xb8/0xc0 [mdt]
12:18:04:[ 7229.241095]  [<ffffffffa0dd7952>] mdt_getattr_name_lock+0x1462/0x1b60 [mdt]
12:18:04:[ 7229.242199]  [<ffffffffa0dd8300>] mdt_intent_getattr+0x2b0/0x480 [mdt]
12:18:04:[ 7229.243240]  [<ffffffffa0ddbf4d>] mdt_intent_policy+0x5ed/0xbf0 [mdt]
12:18:04:[ 7229.244325]  [<ffffffffa09be1e7>] ldlm_lock_enqueue+0x387/0x970 [ptlrpc]
12:18:04:[ 7229.245387]  [<ffffffffa09e74b3>] ldlm_handle_enqueue0+0x9d3/0x1690 [ptlrpc]
12:18:04:[ 7229.246493]  [<ffffffffa0a0f200>] ? lustre_swab_ldlm_request+0x0/0x30 [ptlrpc]
12:18:04:[ 7229.247646]  [<ffffffffa0a68292>] tgt_enqueue+0x62/0x210 [ptlrpc]
12:18:04:[ 7229.248694]  [<ffffffffa0a6d0b5>] tgt_request_handle+0x915/0x1320 [ptlrpc]
12:18:04:[ 7229.249799]  [<ffffffffa0a182bb>] ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x21b/0xa90 [ptlrpc]
12:18:04:[ 7229.250994]  [<ffffffffa0a15e78>] ? ptlrpc_wait_event+0x98/0x340 [ptlrpc]
12:18:04:[ 7229.252160]  [<ffffffff810b8952>] ? default_wake_function+0x12/0x20
12:18:04:[ 7229.253382]  [<ffffffff810af0b8>] ? __wake_up_common+0x58/0x90
12:18:04:[ 7229.254617]  [<ffffffffa0a1c370>] ptlrpc_main+0xaa0/0x1de0 [ptlrpc]
12:18:04:[ 7229.255788]  [<ffffffffa0a1b8d0>] ? ptlrpc_main+0x0/0x1de0 [ptlrpc]
12:18:04:[ 7229.256926]  [<ffffffff810a5b8f>] kthread+0xcf/0xe0
12:18:04:[ 7229.257958]  [<ffffffff810a5ac0>] ? kthread+0x0/0xe0

Please provide additional information about the failure here.

Info required for matching: sanity-sec 16
item.summary: sanity-sec test_16: mdt_pack_size2body() ASSERTION(ma->ma_attr.la_valid & LA_MODE) failed

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment: looks like this is failing with the DoM patches.
